changed_construction_audit.plain_language_claim: The former label merged opaque lexical 難X units, compositional 唔 negation of lexical property predicates, and the distinct prohibitive 唔好 profile. The runtime now preserves those forms under their separate existing analyses.

sources.citation: Lam, Charles, Chaak Ming Lau, and Jackson L. Lee. 2024. Multi-Tiered Cantonese Word Segmentation.
Yip, Moira. 1988. Negation in Cantonese as a Lexical Rule.
Chin, Chi On. 2018. 唔好客氣 vs. 咪走寶: A corpus-based study of Cantonese prohibitive markers.

unresolved_questions: Which additional 難X and 好X lexical property units warrant dictionary entries and sense-specific boundaries?
Which contexts reliably disambiguate ordinary 唔 + 好食 from prohibitive 唔好 + 食?
What role-neutral panel evidence supports the existing context-selection heuristics?

implementation_validation: At v0.5.212, regression remains 551/551, NP remains 43/43, and 1,245 construction assertions across 163 active labels pass. 難食 remains lexical StativePredicate, contextual 唔 + 好食 remains NegatedStativePredicate, overt-object 唔好 + 食 remains ProhibitiveImperative, and bare 唔好食 remains NeedsContext.
linguistic_confidence: Retirement removes a source-disconfirmed merger. It does not establish unrestricted lexical 難X or 好X productivity, validate every tokenizer decision, or promote the replacement labels beyond their current statuses.
overclaim_review_scope: Reviewed both category templates, the late lexical singleton wrapper, tokenizer split behavior, NeedsContext candidates, stative slot lists, the zero-weight reachability probe, the current construction note, and the source-map retirement disposition.
unresolved_release_questions: The remaining 52 implementation-only labels still require source/runtime reconciliation.
The full retirement-review window remains open and must be completed no later than sequence 41.
RUL and PFV survey integration remains paused pending clean locked-instrument evidence.
